mermaidCode:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Blue
    Blue --> DeployingGreen: New release
    DeployingGreen --> SmokeFailed: Tests fail
    SmokeFailed --> Blue: Rollback
    DeployingGreen --> Canary: Tests pass
    Canary --> Rollback: SLO breach
    Rollback --> Blue
    Canary --> RampUp: SLOs healthy
    RampUp --> Green: Full cutover
    Green --> [*]: Promote

rawContext: RAG pipeline sketch for an internal LLM.
mermaidCode:
flowchart TD
    Docs[Source Docs] --> Loader[Doc Loader]
    Loader --> Chunk[Chunker]
    Chunk --> Embed[Embedding Model]
    Embed --> Vec[(Vector Store)]
    User[User Query] --> Embed2[Query Embedder]
    Embed2 --> Search[Top-K Retrieval]
    Vec --> Search
    Search --> Rerank[Cross-Encoder Rerank]
    Rerank --> Prompt[Prompt Builder]
    Prompt --> LLM[LLM]
    LLM --> Answer[Answer]

flowchart LR
    Dev[Developer] -->|git push| GH[GitHub Repo]
    GH -->|webhook| CI[CI Build]
    CI --> Reg[Container Registry]
    GH -->|update manifest| Manifest[Manifest Repo]
    Manifest --> ArgoCD[ArgoCD]
    ArgoCD --> K8s[Kubernetes Cluster]
    Reg --> K8s
    K8s --> Pods[Workload Pods]
    Pods --> LB[Load Balancer]
